name: the coding namespace imports all five EO security-governance authorities
command: for s in cisa-ssdf nist-ai-rmf slsa-framework openssf-scorecard cisa-kev; do grep -q "id: $s" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/security-governance/$s.yaml" || exit 1; done && echo five-authorities 1>&2
